character.label: Damage Effects
character.definition: Character has at least one structured damage effect.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=damage.

character.label: Single Target Damage
character.definition: Character has structured direct damage aimed at one enemy.
character.inference: Assigned when a damage effect targets enemy:1.

character.label: AOE Damage
character.definition: Character has structured direct damage aimed at all enemies.
character.inference: Assigned when a damage effect targets all_enemies.

character.label: Damage Amplification
character.definition: Character has at least one structured increase_damage effect.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=increase_damage.

character.label: Protect Effects
character.definition: Character has at least one structured protect effect.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=protect.

character.label: Self Protection
character.definition: Character has structured protection or damage reduction aimed at self.
character.inference: Assigned when protect/reduce_damage targets self.

character.label: Ally Protection
character.definition: Character has structured protection or damage reduction aimed at an ally, all allies, or a self-or-ally target.
character.inference: Assigned when protect/reduce_damage targets ally, all_allies, or any.

character.label: Damage Reduction
character.definition: Character has at least one structured reduce_damage effect.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=reduce_damage.

character.label: Stun Effects
character.definition: Character has at least one structured stun effect.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=stun.

character.label: Heal Effects
character.definition: Character has at least one structured heal effect.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=heal.

character.label: State Application
character.definition: Character has at least one structured apply_state effect.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=apply_state.

character.label: Removal Effects
character.definition: Character has at least one structured remove_state effect.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=remove_state.

character.label: Gain Effects
character.definition: Character has at least one structured gain effect.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=gain.

character.label: Drain Effects
character.definition: Character has at least one structured drain effect.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=drain.

character.label: Conditional Effects
character.definition: Character has at least one structured conditional effect that changes later skills or windows.
character.inference: Assigned when any skill effect has effect_type=conditional.

character.label: Combo Dependency
character.definition: Character has at least one effect conditioned on a previously used or active skill.
character.inference: Assigned when any effect condition has condition_type=previous_skill.

character.label: State Dependency
character.definition: Character has at least one effect conditioned on a threshold or unresolved state gate.
character.inference: Assigned when any effect condition has condition_type=requires_state.

character.label: Effect Target Unknown
character.definition: Character has at least one effect whose structured target could not be resolved safely.
character.inference: Assigned when any effect ambiguity flag has code=effect_target_unknown.

character.label: Effect Type Heuristic
character.definition: Character has at least one effect typed heuristically instead of by a cleaner parser match.
character.inference: Assigned when any effect ambiguity flag has code=effect_type_heuristic.

character.label: Effect Magnitude Unknown
character.definition: Character has at least one effect with unresolved numeric magnitude.
character.inference: Assigned when any effect ambiguity flag has code=effect_magnitude_unknown.

character.label: Effect Fallback Unknown
character.definition: Character has at least one effect in the explicit fallback unknown bucket.
character.inference: Assigned when any effect ambiguity flag has code=effect_fallback_unknown or effect_type=unknown.

mission.label: Win With Character
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement has requirement_type=win_with_character.

mission.label: Streak
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement has requirement_type=streak.

mission.label: Use Skill
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement has requirement_type=use_skill.

mission.label: Unknown Objective
mission.definition: Mission still carries an explicit unknown requirement because the detail payload did not reveal objective text.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement has requirement_type=unknown.

mission.label: Named Character Refs
mission.definition: Mission includes at least one resolved character ref in its requirements.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement includes non-empty character_refs.

mission.label: Named Skill Refs
mission.definition: Mission includes at least one resolved skill ref in its requirements.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement includes non-empty skill_refs.

mission.label: Counted Progress
mission.definition: Mission requires a counted number of wins, streaks, or skill uses.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement includes a numeric count.

mission.label: Multi Requirement
mission.definition: Mission contains more than one normalized requirement entry.
mission.inference: Assigned when the mission requirements array has length > 1.

mission.label: Objective Text Missing
mission.definition: Mission objective text was unavailable in the captured snapshot.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement ambiguity flag has code=objective_text_missing.

mission.label: Detail Payload Redirect
mission.definition: Mission unknown state is supported by a redirect-shaped detail payload.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement ambiguity flag has code=detail_payload_redirect.

mission.label: Detail Payload Error Page
mission.definition: Mission unknown state is supported by an error-page detail payload.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement ambiguity flag has code=detail_payload_error_page.

mission.label: Detail Payload Unexpected Home
mission.definition: Mission unknown state is supported by an unexpected-home fallback payload.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement ambiguity flag has code=detail_payload_unexpected_home.

mission.label: Character Group Not Modeled
mission.definition: Mission objective refers to a character group that is still preserved only in free text.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement ambiguity flag has code=character_group_not_modeled.

mission.label: Multi Character Condition Not Structured
mission.definition: Mission objective contains a compound character condition that stays only in free text.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement ambiguity flag has code=multi_character_condition_not_structured.

mission.label: Character Subject Not Resolved
mission.definition: Mission objective names a character subject that could not be resolved into a normalized character ref.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement ambiguity flag has code=character_subject_not_resolved.

mission.label: Skill Reference Not Resolved
mission.definition: Mission objective names a skill that could not be resolved into a normalized skill ref.
mission.inference: Assigned when any requirement ambiguity flag has code=skill_reference_not_resolved.
